name: @gotong/example-a2a-long-running-step
description: A LONG-RUNNING external A2A agent as a workflow step (Stream H2) — the sibling of a2a-workflow-step. There the external agent answers message/send in one round-trip; here it SUSPENDS (returns a working Task: long compute / its own HITL), so the whole workflow run parks, polls tasks/get until the remote settles, then feeds the verdict into a local step. The lifecycle A2aRemoteParticipant parks with a FINITE resumeAt, so the host sweep converges the run with NO host/runner change. Deterministic (injected fetch returns working→working→completed + an inlined sweep loop mirroring the host), no API key, no socket.
